cases.title: VPN Authentication Timeout
cases.description: VPN drops connection every 30 minutes with an Auth-Timeout error.

cases.title: Wi-Fi Signal Dead Zone
cases.description: Wi-Fi signal is non-existent in Conference Room B on the 3rd floor.

cases.title: Login Portal 403 Error
cases.description: Mobile users on Safari report a 403 Forbidden error when trying to access the login portal.

cases.title: Application Startup Crash
cases.description: Application consistently freezes and crashes at the splash screen on macOS Sonoma.

cases.title: Unauthorized Data Access
cases.description: User reported seeing sensitive project folders they do not have permissions to access.

cases.title: Phishing Email Report
cases.description: Several employees reported receiving suspicious emails with a fake link disguised as IT Support.

cases.title: Database Connection Pool Exhausted
cases.description: The application is throwing Too many connections errors during peak business hours.

cases.title: ETL Import Process Failure
cases.description: The nightly CSV import job is failing midway with a memory overflow error.

cases.title: New Hire Provisioning Request
cases.description: Need a new Active Directory account and email access for a new hire starting Monday.

cases.title: Production System Access Request
cases.description: Requesting temporary sudo access to the production jump server to investigate a critical bug.
